author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: info_diagnostic_endpoints_exposed
summary: Re-fetches the catalogue of framework / server diagnostic endpoints (trace.axd, elmah.axd, actuator, server-status, Tomcat manager, etc.) and asserts whether any still answer with a content-specific signature.

args.--max-paths: Cap on number of paths tested (default 20)
